title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 15th April 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Do not sell at these levels; exit only near 1,700. Don't switch to Persistent/Coforge.
recommendations.detail: Hold; do NOT sell at current levels. Exit only when it reaches close to 1,700. Switching now into Persistent or Coforge is not correct.

recommendations.note: Accumulate slowly; corrected from recent high, consolidating 1,300-1,350, decent results, recent QIP.
recommendations.detail: Accumulate slowly ("hold and buy"); corrected a lot from recent high, now consolidating in the 1,300-1,350 range; decent last-quarter results; did a recent QIP.

recommendations.note: His favourite small-cap scheme; extraordinary, resilient 2-3 year returns, good portfolio.
recommendations.detail: His favourite small-cap mutual fund scheme as of now; extraordinary resilient performance with good returns over 2-3 years; solid portfolio. Nippon India Small Cap also possible.

recommendations.note: Rated above Nippon; strong 2-year performance; holdings incl. Max Healthcare, KIMS, InterGlobe, Swiggy.
recommendations.detail: Rated above Nippon India Small Cap; fine 2-year performance; top holdings include Max Healthcare, KIMS, InterGlobe, Swiggy, Aditya Infotech (CP Plus surveillance cameras), Sai Life Sciences, Amber.

recommendations.note: Hold, no hurry to sell; consolidating ~200 under new management; wait 3-4 quarters for returns.
recommendations.detail: Hold; no immediate hurry to sell. Formerly Sequent; consolidating around 200 after restructuring; now under new management and doing well. Needs patience - wait three to four quarters for real returns; don't expect immediate returns. (Name uncertain in transcript.)

recommendations.note: Start accumulating, no fear; doing extremely well, Zambian ops stabilising; stock eased to ~30.
recommendations.detail: Doing extremely well, no doubt; even though last quarter top line and bottom line dipped marginally, Zambian operations are giving good returns and stabilising; stock eased to near 30. Start accumulating, no need to fear.

recommendations.note: Worst is over after deep fall, now bouncing; huge order book, on a good track.
recommendations.detail: The worst is over after a deep fall from a high price; now seeing some bounce-back. Has a huge order book (execution unknown until results), on a good track. Hold it.

recommendations.note: Excellent choice; nothing to complain about.
recommendations.detail: Part of a good list; especially Sansera and Shilchar are excellent choices, nothing to complain about.

recommendations.note: Excellent choice; nothing to complain about.

recommendations.detail: You can attempt DCB at current levels; one of the private banks undergoing total changes and doing quite well, so definitely you can attempt it.
